title: Playwright Notion Isolation Audit
summary: Reduces Playwright 4-worker collisions by making Notion-related blog mutation tests create and open their own blog fixtures.
changed: Updated admin-blog-edit to avoid editing the first global admin blog row.
Updated Notion autosave/info tests to open explicit blog ids.
Updated Notion visual and semantic color tests to use owned blog fixtures.
Added grounded 60-second timeouts to Notion-heavy specs.
rootCausesAddressed: Notion tests mutated the default first global blog document.
admin-blog-edit mutated the first admin row, which can be generated baseline content under parallel execution.
Generated baseline specs and Notion/admin edit specs shared the same mutable blog list.

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npx playwright test tests/admin-blog-edit.spec.ts tests/ui-admin-notion-autosave-info.spec.ts tests/ui-admin-notion-visual-state.spec.ts tests/ui-admin-semantic-colors.spec.ts --workers=1

PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npx playwright test tests/admin-blog-edit.spec.ts tests/ui-admin-notion-autosave-info.spec.ts tests/ui-admin-notion-visual-state.spec.ts tests/ui-admin-semantic-colors.spec.ts tests/plain-baseline-0419.spec.ts --workers=4
validations.result: 48 passed after fix; before fix reproduced 1 baseline collision failure

remainingRisks: Other global singleton areas remain: resume/site settings/pages and work media ordering.
Fixture records are not deleted after tests.
Full-suite 4-worker run was not claimed fixed by this slice.
recommendation: Proceed with this first isolation slice; next isolate work/media thumbnail ordering or singleton resume/page/site-settings tests.
